---
title: "ENVS 3 Project"
date: 3-9-2026
image: zine-digital.jpg
format: html
draft: false
---
# ENVS 3 Final Project Overview
This project was completed in March 2026 for Environmental Studies 3: Introduction to the Social and Cultural Environment at UCSB. I chose to complete a creative project in the format of a zine which focused on ways to reduce eco-anxiety. My target audience was fellow UCSB students.

[See my write-up for this project](zine-writeup.pdf)

[See Works Cited](zine-works-cited.pdf)

[Download Printable Version](zine-printable.pdf)

[Download Digital Version](zine-digital.pdf)

{{< pdf "zine-digital.pdf" width=100% height=800 >}}
